subject: Tuesday bouldering session?
snippet: Hey, you going to the gym Tuesday? I'm heading over around 6:30...
body:
Hey Frank,

You going to the gym Tuesday? I'm heading over around 6:30 to hit the cave wall before they reset it. Also heard they're doing a route setting night on June 11 if you want to volunteer.

- Rowan

subject: Cook night July - Japanese theme confirmed
snippet: Frank! Japanese theme is a go for the 12th. I'll bring the dashi and kombu, can you handle the soba noodles and the sesame...
body:
Frank!

Japanese theme is a go for the 12th. I'll bring the dashi and kombu, can you handle the soba noodles and the sesame dressing? Also thinking we do karaage chicken as a main. Marcus is in, Rowan said maybe.

Sasha

subject: Thanksgiving plans - Boise Nov 26-30
snippet: Hey Frank - Mom wants to confirm you're still coming Nov 26. Carter and I are flying in the 25th...
body:
Hey Frank,

Mom wants to confirm you're still coming Nov 26. Carter and I are flying in the 25th so we'll be there to pick you up from the airport if you want to coordinate flights. Dad's already asking about the smoker menu lol.

- Jude

subject: Quick thought on the pacing app Q3 feature list
snippet: Frank - keeping this off the work email for now since it's just early thinking. The 30-day graph you flagged is making it onto the Q3 list...
body:
Frank -

Keeping this off the work email for now since it's just early thinking. The 30-day graph you flagged is making it onto the Q3 list - Amy's scoping it this sprint. The onboarding step reorder you suggested is the one I want to nail before launch. Can we hop on a call this week, maybe Thursday 7pm MT?

- Dev

subject: Glacier NP trip - booking the cabin
snippet: Hey bro - I found a great cabin near Lake McDonald, Dec 18-20. It fits four people. Rowan said he's in if...
body:
Hey bro,

I found a great cabin near Lake McDonald for Dec 18-20. It fits four people. Rowan said he's in if you're in. Cabin sleeps 4, wood stove, hot tub. Only 2 nights available so we need to book fast. Want me to split the cost 4 ways?

- Carter

subject: Re: Blue Mountain hike Oct 17 - confirmed
snippet: I'm in. Let's do sunrise start. Meet at the trailhead at 5:30am? I'll bring coffee and the GPX route on my phone...
body:
I'm in. Let's do sunrise start. Meet at the trailhead at 5:30am? I'll bring coffee and the GPX route on my phone. Sasha might join if she's not working that weekend. 7-mile roundtrip to the summit, should be a solid 4-hour day.

- Frank

subject: Registration confirmed: Bozeman Hand Therapy Intensive Nov 14-16
snippet: You're registered! Bozeman Hand Therapy Intensive - Nov 14-16, 2026 at MSU Strand Union Building...
body:
You're registered!

Bozeman Hand Therapy Intensive
Nov 14-16, 2026 | MSU Strand Union Building Hall, Bozeman MT

Order #: BZ2026-HTCEU-47291
Registration: Full Registration - 3-Day CEU Intensive
Total: $425.00

Please bring your MT Occupational Therapy license number for CEU credit verification.

subject: Amazon buyer message - order #113-4729183-8847291
snippet: Your buyer sent a message about order 113-4729183-8847291 (BD Camalot C4 0.5 - used condition)...
body:
Your buyer sent a message about order #113-4729183-8847291:

"Hi - received the Camalot today. Great condition, exactly as described. Just wanted to confirm the biner gate action is smooth before I take it out on real routes. Can you confirm you tested it recently?"

Reply through Seller Central to respond.

subject: Cook night last Saturday - recipe recap
snippet: Sasha - that sesame soba was a hit. I'm writing up the recipe tonight so we don't lose it...
body:
Sasha,

That sesame soba was a hit. Writing up the recipe tonight while it's fresh. Cold noodles with the ginger-sesame dressing, topped with shredded chicken and cucumber. The ratio you used for the dressing was better than mine - can you send it?

Also the karaage technique you showed me is going in my rotation permanently.

- Frank

body:
Frank -

Sent the updated advisory agreement via DocuSign to your MCWC Chronic Pain Program email. Includes the updated hourly rate and the expanded professional review scope we discussed. Let me know once you've reviewed it.

- Dev

subject: Re: Q3 feature list - Thursday works
snippet: Thursday 7pm MT works. I'll dial into Google Meet. A few more items I want to flag before the call - the ICD-10 filter...
body:
Thursday 7pm MT works. I'll dial into Google Meet.

A few more items I want to flag before the call:
- ICD-10 filter for the community partner portal (the 6 groupings I sent in the GitHub issue)
- WCAG alert banner issue - that one's a participant safety concern, not just accessibility
- The Goals of Care field for billing narrative

None of these are blocking launch but they matter for professional adoption.

- Frank

subject: Dad's birthday gift - going in on the wood project together?
snippet: Hey - Mom said Dad's been eyeing that Benchmade knife set. Want to split it three ways? $80 each...
body:
Hey Frank,

Mom said Dad's been eyeing that Benchmade knife set. Want to split it three ways with Carter and me? $80 each. I'll order it if you both Venmo me. Need it in time for July 4.

- Jude

subject: MTOTA membership renewal - dues due July 1
snippet: Your MTOTA membership renews July 1. Annual dues: $180 for active licensed Occupational Therapy members...
body:
Your MTOTA membership is up for renewal on July 1, 2026.

Annual dues: $180 (active licensed Occupational Therapy)
Renew online at mtota.org or mail a check to the MTOTA treasurer.

Thank you for your continued support of Occupational Therapy practice in Montana.

subject: Re: Glacier cabin Dec 18-20 - I'm in, book it!
snippet: Book it! Split 4 ways is perfect. Rowan said yes too. Should we coordinate on gear? I can bring the...
body:
Book it! Split 4 ways is perfect. Rowan said yes too.

Should we coordinate on gear? I can bring the portable camp stove and a cast iron pan. We'll need firewood - check if the rental includes that. Also worth booking the Going-to-the-Sun Road closure dates - might be closed to cars by mid-December.

- Frank
